name: Fragment of Desire
descs:
Activates when using E.G.O Skills that inflict [Burst] Potency or Count.

Gain Final Power equal to (Gluttony E.G.O resource + sum of other E.G.O resources/3) consumed and deal +50% damage

Gluttony E.G.O Skills: Inflict additional [Burst] Count based on E.G.O grades (ZAYIN inflicts +2 Count, TETH inflicts +3 Count, HE inflicts +4 Count, and so on), and deal +(# of different E.G.O resource used x 15)% damage
